Description
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter
 
org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.antlr4
 
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.antlr4 used by org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter
    Class
    Description
    FiltersBaseVisitor
    This class provides an empty implementation of FiltersVisitor, which can be extended to create a visitor which only needs to handle a subset of the available methods.
    FiltersParser.AndExpressionContext
     
    FiltersParser.BooleanConstantContext
     
    FiltersParser.CompareExpressionContext
     
    FiltersParser.CompoundIdentifierContext

    FiltersParser.IsNullExpressionContext
     
    FiltersParser.LongConstantContext

    FiltersParser.OrExpressionContext
     
    FiltersParser.QuotedIdentifierContext
     
    FiltersParser.SimpleIdentifierContext
     
    FiltersParser.TextConstantContext
     
    FiltersParser.WhereContext
     
    FiltersVisitor
    This interface defines a complete generic visitor for a parse tree produced by FiltersParser.
  • Classes in org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.antlr4 used by org.springframework.ai.vectorstore.filter.antlr4
    Class
    Description
    FiltersListener
    This interface defines a complete listener for a parse tree produced by FiltersParser.
